scenarios.name: single_pdf_review
scenarios.description: Single PDF, no companion data. Should produce 1 detector block + HTML report.

scenarios.name: xlsx_with_data_source
scenarios.description: Fixture factory produces a valid openpyxl workbook. The real R-2026-06-14 XLSX fix is asserted in tests/test_chat_trust_fixes.py.

scenarios.name: bash_dangerous_blocked
scenarios.description: Bash tool is asked to run 'rm -rf /'. Should be blocked by the denylist.

scenarios.name: budget_exhausted
scenarios.description: Agent exceeds per-name tool cap. Should produce a typed error message that names the env var.
scenarios.user_message: 无限循环调用同一个 tool 看看会不会卡死

scenarios.name: chat_continuity
scenarios.description: Round 1 asks for ingest; round 2 says '下一步' and the LLM should NOT re-ask for the PDF path.
